results.title: French Baguette with Garlic Filling 160g
results.description: The French baguette with garlic from NOVUS is a classic of French cuisine with a modern twist. Baked according to traditional recipes, this baguette features a crispy crust and a soft, airy crumb. Aromatic garlic, a key ingredient, not only enriches the flavor but also imparts health benefits to the baked goods. The French baguette is perfect for soups, especially broths, and can also serve as a base for bruschettas with various toppings. It makes a great addition to breakfast, lunch, or dinner. The baguette can be enjoyed instead of bread with cheeses, cured meats, vegetables, and olives. Garlic is known for its antibacterial properties and its ability to improve digestion. So, by choosing the French baguette with garlic from NOVUS, you not only indulge in delightful flavors but also enjoy its health benefits.
ingredients: Loaf (wheat flour, drinking water, pressed baker's yeast, iodized edible salt (salt, potassium iodide), rapeseed oil, thickener E412, emulsifier E472e, acidity regulator: E450, E341; wheat malt flour, ascorbic acid E300, flavorings); garlic filling (butter 44%, margarine (vegetable oils: palm rapeseed; drinking water, salt, emulsifiers E322, E471; acidity regulator E330, flavoring, dye E160a), drinking water, garlic granules 3.5%, iodized edible salt (salt potassium iodide), powdered onions, parsley. May contain eggs, soy, celery, mustard, nuts, sesame.

results.title: Farmer's Bread 300g
results.description: Farmer's bread is a rye-wheat masterpiece of baking, which Masters of Taste create from carefully selected ingredients. Wheat flour, water, sourdough, sugar, salt, dry milk and sunflower oil are used to prepare bread - all these components help to create the ideal dough consistency and unique taste. Our bakers pay special attention to the baking process to ensure the Farmer's Bread has a crispy crust. Farmer's bread is not just a pastry, it is a symbol of quality and naturalness. It can be served with various cheese or meat delicacies, and also used to create delicious sandwiches. This bread is rich in fiber and essential nutrients. Choose Farmer's Bread at NOVUS and enjoy exquisite pastries that will bring a wealth of taste to your table.
ingredients: Drinking water; premium flour; Kerot Fit mix: (wheat flour, pumpkin seeds, dried carrots, dried durum wheat sourdough (durum wheat, lactic acid bacteria starter cultures), rye flakes, oat flakes, flax seeds, sunflower seeds, rye bran, soy flakes, wheat gluten, wheat malt, guar gum, enzymes, ascorbic acid. results.title: Kyivkhlib Velvet Sliced Bread Half 350g
results.description:
Bread, which became a favorite even before it hit store shelves. This product has been used for many years, the best ingredients have been selected and its production fully meets the needs of the market.
The new bread has succeeded in everything, it includes: natural raw materials, quality flour, various types of sourdough, convenient shape, good appetizing appearance, and cumin and coriander enhance the fragrant aroma. Our masterpiece completes the baking process, as it takes place in a unique oven with a stone hearth. The technologists have created an unusually beautiful crumb - tender and fluffy, and when you take bread in your hands, as if touching velvet, hence the warm name "velvet".
Enjoy!
ingredients: High quality wheat flour, drinking water, flour rye bread crumble, wheat gluten dry, invert syrup (white crystalline sugar, drinking water, acidity regulators: citric acid, sodium bicarbonate), concentrate of kvass wort (rye flour, rye malt fermented, barley malt, drinking water), flour rye sown baking, dry mix of baking "Solodova new" (malt ferment wheat malt, rye unfermented flour, rye extrusion, mashed potato powder (potatoes, fresh, stabilizer E471), coriander, cumin), yeast baking pressed, sunflower oil refined deodorized, baking mix "Barley leaven" (flour barley extruded, flour rye sieve, malt rye unfermented, drinking water), rennet dry fermented malt, salt dish, cumin, rye dry malt unfermentated, coriander ground.

results.title: Walnut Poppy Bun 250g
results.description: Our masters first knead a loose yeast dough based on yogurt. They roll it out evenly and generously cover it with a sweet poppy seed filling mixed with finely chopped, lightly roasted walnuts. Then, they delicately shape it into a braid, which is adorned with sugar and dry poppy seeds, and bake it until it reaches a gentle caramel color. We recommend trying the freshly baked pastry with a glass of warm milk!

results.title: Bagel 80g
results.description: Bagel is a pastry masterpiece created by our talented bakers using the finest ingredients. Preparation of bagels begins with the selection of the best flour, to which water, a mixture of wheat, yeast, salt, sugar and natural margarine are added. This recipe gives bagels a unique taste and texture. The formed buns go through the process of cooking in water, where they acquire their characteristic appearance and smooth crust. After that, they are baked in the oven to a golden hue, where they acquire a unique aroma of fresh baked goods. Bagels can be served with a variety of toppings, such as cream cheese, salmon, avocado, or cheese sauce. They are perfectly combined with fresh vegetables, egg or ham, creating incredible taste combinations. Enjoy the unique aroma and taste of bagels from NOVUS.
ingredients: High grade flour; grain mix (sunflower seeds, flax seeds, wheat gluten, pumpkin seeds, dry whey, dextrose, sugar, emulsifier: diacetyl tartaric and fatty acids, antioxidant: ascorbic acid, enzymes); margarine (refined deodorized sunflower and palm oil in natural and partially hydrogenated form, drinking water, edible salt, emulsifiers E471, soy lecithin), preservative sorbic acid, flavoring agent "Butter", acidity regulator lactic acid, dye beta-carotene); drinking water; pressed yeast; pumpkin seeds; sunflower oil.

results.title: Rumianets Rumjany Bread 600g
results.description: Our signature and one of your favorite rye-wheat breads. It combines second-grade wheat flour with wholemeal rye flour, making it not only uniquely delicious but also very nutritious. The live rye sourdough helps unlock all the benefits of the flour blend, enhances the gentle rye-wheat aroma, and gives the crumb a light, airy texture. The brick shape of this bread is intentional: baking in a mold creates a thin, golden crust. This is the true “Rumianyi” Bread from TM Rumianets. We recommend enjoying Rumianyi Bread alongside authentic Rivne-style matsik for a perfect pairing.
ingredients:
Second grade wheat flour, peeled rye flour, drinking water, pressed baker's yeast, table salt, sunflower oil.
This product contains gluten (a plant protein found in wheat and rye grains).

results.title: Sausage with Ketchup and Mayonnaise in Puff Pastry 110g
results.description: The sausage in puff pastry with ketchup and mayonnaise (110g) is a true masterpiece from the Masters of Taste! We invite you on a delicious journey with the sausage in puff pastry from NOVUS— a dish that impresses with its simplicity and unmatched flavor. Here, every ingredient is the key to a flavor explosion. The carefully selected wheat flour, the juiciness of the sausages, and the expertly crafted puff pastry make this snack truly exceptional. Add to that mayonnaise and ketchup, and you have an explosion of taste. This dish is perfect for a quick snack or a fun party with friends. This snack is not just a pleasure for the palate but also a quick way to satisfy your hunger. The sausage in puff pastry with ketchup and mayonnaise from NOVUS is not just a dish; it's a quick and delicious path to enjoyment.
ingredients: Dough: high grade wheat flour, margarine for puff pastry (vegetable fats and refined deodorized oils: palm, sunflower in variable proportions), drinking water, sugar, pressed baker's yeast, table margarine (vegetable fats, palm and palm kernel in variable proportions, refined and deodorized in natural and partially hydrogenated state), dry wheat gluten, flour improver (wheat gluten, wheat flour, emulsifier E472c, deactivated yeast, antioxidant ascorbic acid), edible table salt, emulsifier E471, acidity regulator citric acid, refined and deodorized sunflower oil; filling: sausage 1/g 28.4% (chicken meat 55%, drinking water, chicken skin, pork or beef fat, mechanically deboned chicken meat 10%, dry milk whey, edible salt, milk protein, table mustard (drinking water, mustard powder, sugar, sunflower oil, acidity regulator E260, edible salt, bay leaf, black pepper), stabilizer E450, acidity regulator E451, flavor enhancer E621, flavors: meat, garlic, milk; wheat maltodextrin, glucose, sugar, antioxidant E316, fermented red rice flour, natural dye carmine, color fixatives: E250, E251), mayonnaise 9.4% (refined deodorized sunflower oil, drinking water, sugar, table salt food, dry fermented egg yolk, thickener modified starch (corn or potato), acidity regulators: acetic acid, citric acid; stabilizers: guar gum, xanthan gum; preservative potassium sorbate, mustard flavoring, natural color beta-carotene), pasteurized tomato ketchup 1.1% (drinking water, sugar, tomato paste, thickener modified corn starch, edible salt, acidity regulator citric acid, stabilizer guar gum, preservative E202, ground spices: cumin, onion), thickener modeled corn starch, sugar, frozen garlic; surface: drinking water, refined deodorized sunflower oil, stabilization system (milk protein, skimmed milk powder, emulsifier E339, lactose, thickener E415, emulsifier soya lecithin, lysine (standardized with dextrose, palm oil).

Our bakers, with experience and care, skilfully combine these ingredients, creating Campagne bread rolls with a refined taste, delicate texture and crispy crust. results.title: Puff Pastry Triangle with Suluguni 85g
results.description: The Appetizing Puff Pastry Triangle with Suluguni (85g) is perfection on your table! This pastry combines golden puff pastry with a rich creamy aroma and the tender, slightly salty taste of suluguni cheese. The Masters of Taste at NOVUS carefully select the ingredients and prepare the triangles according to a traditional recipe. Thanks to the multi-layered dough and delicious suluguni, they turn out incredibly crispy. This dish is suitable for any time of day, making it a wonderful addition to your morning coffee, a satisfying snack, or a light dinner. The flavor of the suluguni triangle is enhanced by vegetables, herbs, deli meats, and sauces. Suluguni cheese is rich in calcium, protein, and B vitamins, and it also contains phosphorus, potassium, and other beneficial microelements. Try the Suluguni Puff Pastry Triangle from the Masters of Taste at NOVUS – treat yourself to a crispy delight!
ingredients: Premium wheat flour, drinking water, margarine for puff pastry (refined deodorized palm and sunflower oils in natural and partially hydrogenated form, drinking water, emulsifiers: mono- and diglycerides of fatty acids E471, polyglyceride esters of fatty acids E475, soy lecithin; preservative potassium sorbate E202, starter cultures, milk curdling preparation), hard cheese (whole cow's milk, skimmed cow's milk, edible salt, thickener calcium chloride E509, preservative potassium nitrate E252, starter culture, enzyme preparation, annatto dye E160b), processed cheese (drinking water, cheese, butter, skimmed milk powder, thickener modified corn starch, emulsifying salt (sodium polyphosphates E452), emulsifier (glycerol, diacetyl tartaric and fatty acid esters E472e, calcium carbonate E170), stabilizer (carrageenan E407, potassium chloride E508, dextrose), flavoring, edible salt, acidity regulator citric acid E330), sugar, pressed baker's yeast, refined sunflower oil, table margarine (refined deodorized sunflower and palm oils in natural and partially hydrogenated form, drinking water, edible salt, emulsifiers: E471, soy lecithin, preservative sorbic acid E200, flavoring "Butter", acidity regulator lactic acid E270, dye beta-carotene), edible salt, Flour improver (wheat gluten, wheat flour, anti-caking agent calcium carbonate E170, emulsifier E472e, enzymes, antioxidant ascorbic acid E300, flour improver L-cysteine E920), wheat gluten, thickener modified potato starch E1414, skimmed milk powder.

results.title: Lithuanian Bread with Sunflower Seeds
results.description: From rye and wheat flour, dry malt, caraway seeds, and boiling water, our bakers prepare a starter and let it rest. They knead the dough, adding roasted sunflower seeds, and leave it to ferment. The dough is shaped into elongated rectangular loaves and baked. This fragrant, soft bread tastes similar to Riga bread: slightly sour-sweet, spicy, and tangy. It pairs wonderfully with butter, cheeses, fish, or pâtés.
ingredients: Infusion (drinking water, rye flour, rye malt (fermented rye grain), caraway); rye flour; drinking water; premium wheat flour; sunflower seeds; granulated sugar; pressed yeast; edible table salt; caramel malt mix (fermented malt, premium wheat flour, natural dye E150); light riteza (drinking water, sourdough (water, rye flour), pre-cooked wheat flour, acidity regulators: acetic acid E260, citric acid E330, rye malt flour, antioxidant: ascorbic acid E300, stabilizer: xanthan gum); vegetable oil.

results.title: Tsar Hlib Pansky Sliced Bread 400g

results.title: Yogurt Muffin with Black Currant 80g
results.description: The yogurt muffin with black currants is an unparalleled dessert that captivates with its vibrant flavor and aroma. Crafted by our Masters of Taste using fresh ingredients, this muffin begins with a base of yogurt batter that ensures a tender texture and lightness. The addition of sunflower oil, a melange, and water makes it even juicier and softer. The real surprise in this dessert is the black currants, which perfectly complement the delicate base. This berry is also rich in vitamins and antioxidants, making the muffin not only delicious but also a healthy treat. The bakers at NOVUS expertly bake each muffin to achieve the perfect consistency. Each product is infused with the aroma of fresh berries and boasts an unmatched taste that will leave an unforgettable impression. Order the yogurt muffin with black currants from NOVUS to enjoy its sweetness alongside a cup of berry tea.
ingredients: Yogurt cake mix (white crystalline sugar, premium wheat flour, wheat starch, corn starch E1422, glucose syrup, baking powder (E450і, baking soda, E336), emulsifiers (mono- and diglycerides of fatty acids), yogurt powder, edible salt, skimmed milk powder, thickeners (xanthan gum, sodium alginate), carrot extract, flavoring (vanilla); refined sunflower oil; drinking water; egg melange; freshly frozen currants; freshskipper stabilizer (glycerin, glucose-fructose syrup, sorbitol stabilizer, enzymes).

results.title: Butter Bun with Cinnamon 70g
results.description: Сinnamon roll is a magical pastry that will transport you to a world of fragrant memories and taste. Made from wheat flour, water, yogurt mixture, melange, yeast and soft butter. His unique recipe, passed down from generation to generation, has become a true classic in the baking world. Our Taste Masters prepare each cinnamon roll with great care. They carefully mix the ingredients, form delicate curls and use ground cinnamon to give the baked goods a unique aroma and rich taste. Every sip of this wonderful dessert transports you to the world of carefree childhood memories and comfort. Order a curl with cinnamon at NOVUS, allow yourself this luxurious pleasure with your favorite tea or coffee when meeting with relatives.
ingredients: High grade flour; drinking water; yogurt bun mix (sugar, wheat flour, dry whey, salt, flavoring, emulsifiers E472e, E471, soy lecithin; wheat starch, beta-carotene dye, enzymes, ascorbic acid. May contain traces of: eggs, sesame, peanuts, nuts); butter (natural pasteurized cream from cow's milk); granulated sugar; margarine (refined deodorized sunflower and palm oil in natural and partially hydrogenated form, drinking water, edible salt, emulsifiers E471, soy lecithin), sorbic acid preservative, "Butter" flavoring, lactic acid acidity regulator, beta-carotene dye); melange (edible chicken eggs); pressed yeast; granulated sugar; ground cinnamon.

results.title: Yeast-free Rye Bread 300g
results.description: NOVUS masters spread rectangular loaves of rye dough on flat perforated sheets and bake them. Yeast-free bread made from cereals has a rich, slightly sour taste and a bright aroma. It goes well with smoked or salted fish, lemons, sprats, cheese, fresh tomatoes and cucumbers.
ingredients: Rye sourdough (peeled rye flour, drinking water, mesophilic bacteria); drinking water; premium wheat flour; rye flour; fermented rye malt; white sugar; table salt; dough improver (contains wheat gluten); decoration: rye bran.

results.title: Artisan Sourdough Bread
results.description: Craft Sourdough Bread, elongated – this is the true taste of homemade bread, which has been baked by our ancestors for centuries. Craft Sourdough Bread can be enjoyed as a standalone dish (with butter, cheese, honey, jam, or preserves) or in combination with other products (for sandwiches, salads, or cheesy soups with croutons). This bread is a healthy product as it contains: B vitamins, which are necessary for the proper functioning of the nervous system, skin, hair, and nails; minerals such as calcium, iron, magnesium, and phosphorus, which are essential for strengthening bones, muscles, and teeth; proteins, which are needed for tissue growth and repair. The bread has a pleasant aroma of fresh baking with a slight tanginess, thanks to the sourdough. Craft Sourdough Bread, elongated, is a tasty, healthy, and aromatic product that is definitely worth trying at NOVUS.
ingredients: Premium wheat flour; drinking water; Craft mix (pumpkin powder, sunflower seeds, flax seeds, corn flakes, apple powder, potato flour, wheat flour, gluten, dry milk, enzymes); mega-additive mix (dry durum wheat sourdough (durum wheat, lactic acid bacteria starter cultures); dry milk, table salt, gluten; rye flour.

results.title: Brioche Bun for Burger 80g
results.description: Brioche bun for burger 80 g is the queen among bread delicacies. The bun has an unsurpassed golden color and a lush, soft structure. Its delicate taste and buttery aroma add a unique note of luxury and pleasure to the burger. This bun pairs well with whatever toppings you choose for your burger. It perfectly harmonizes with juicy pieces of meat, crunchy vegetables and sauces, giving the dish a unique taste touch. Our Brioche bun is made from high-quality ingredients, with the addition of fresh butter, which makes it especially tender and filling. Without artificial additives and preservatives, it is created to satisfy your taste preferences. Choose it at NOVUS - your reliable partner in the world of delicious products. Experience the unique luxury and pleasure that the 80g Brioche Burger Bun will bring you. You deserve the best!
ingredients: High grade wheat flour; drinking water; melange (edible chicken eggs); margarine (refined deodorized sunflower and palm oil in natural and partially hydrogenated form, drinking water, table salt, emulsifiers E471, soy lecithin), preservative sorbic acid, butter flavoring, acidity regulator lactic acid, dye beta-carotene); granulated sugar; dry milk (normalized cow's milk); pressed yeast; hot dog mix (soy flour, wheat flour, wheat gluten, emulsifier E472e, ascorbic acid. May contain traces of: eggs, sesame, nuts, peanuts, dry milk); table salt.

results.title: Rumianets Latvian Sliced Bread 400g
results.description: A bread that delights with its harmony of taste and aroma. Its foundation is a live rye sourdough, which brings softness and a unique depth of flavor. Potato flakes and barley malt extract add juiciness and richness, while a gentle hint of caraway flows into a delicate aftertaste. A touch of natural sunflower honey finishes the composition with a mild sweetness. Every slice is a refined balance of nourishment and pleasure — a flavor that makes an everyday snack or a festive meal truly special.
ingredients:
First grade wheat flour, peeled rye flour, drinking water, potato flakes, sugar-glucose syrup "Leipomo", dark malt barley extract, pressed baker's yeast, table salt, natural sunflower honey, caraway seeds. Decoration: semolina.
This product contains gluten (a plant protein found in wheat, rye, and barley grains).

Tasty Style quinoa corn and rice breads are made using a unique technology using a mixture of whole grains of corn, rice and quinoa.
Corn and rice quinoa breads contain vitamins B, A, K, E, D, phosphorus, potassium, calcium, copper, iron, potassium, magnesium and many other useful amino acids and antioxidants.
